ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the state is located */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* ISO code or state code */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "climate" TEXT /* General climate type of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the district is located */,
  "district_code" TEXT /* ISO code or district code */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the district */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the district in square kilometers */,
  "climate" TEXT /* General climate type of the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_districts_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "markets" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market */,
  "market_name" TEXT /* Name of the market */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district where the market is located */,
  "market_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the market */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the market */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the market */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the market */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_markets_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commodities" (
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commodity */,
  "commodity_name" TEXT /* Name of the commodity */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the commodity (e.g., Cereals, Pulses) */,
  "commodity_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the commodity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the commodity */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the commodity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commodity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "varieties" (
  "variety_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variety */,
  "variety_name" TEXT /* Name of the variety */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the commodity the variety belongs to */,
  "variety_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the variety */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the variety */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the variety */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variety_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_varieties_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market where the price was recorded */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the commodity */,
  "variety_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the variety of the commodity */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "min_price" INTEGER /* Minimum price of the commodity variety */,
  "max_price" INTEGER /* Maximum price of the commodity variety */,
  "modal_price" INTEGER /* Modal price of the commodity variety */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the price data */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the price data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the price record */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_records_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_records_variety_id FOREIGN KEY ("variety_id") REFERENCES varieties ("variety_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_records_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data entry clerk, analyst, admin) */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district the user is associated with */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the price record that was changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the change */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES price_records ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., average price, price volatility) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the metric is calculated */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric data */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_metrics_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the price record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES price_records ("record_id")
)
